reviews.review_description: It’s hard to find a server. And even harder to get friends in a lobby but over all it’s a okay game 👍🏻

I like the game and yeah it feels kinda choppy but it’s not a bad choppy overall i love the game. I wish there was a discord server though for the community. I think it would make the game more active too.

developer_response.body: Sorry for the late reply! There is a button for the discord server on the main menu that you can join. There will be an update soon with more guns and I'm working on a new defusal game mode so hopefully it will get more active!

Hi, add please k3d pistol option,search k3design dot store

developer_response.body: Hello, sorry for the late reply! This is currently in development and I will add an option to change location/rotation of hands soon!

developer_response.body: Sorry for the late reply! Gunfight is fully multiplayer so sometimes no one is on for public matches :( I'm sorry that you had this issue. I will add bots in the future!

developer_response.body: Sorry for the late reply! This issue should be fixed now.

reviews.review_description: Trash

reviews.review_title: Love the game definitely has potiental
reviews.review_description:
All I gotta say is the game has serious potential. As I get more familiar with it, I might start posting content around it. Overall, it’s a great experience so far.

Also, consider setting up a Discord server in the future (if you haven’t already). It’d be a great way to announce updates, build a community, and keep everyone in the loop.

developer_response.body: Thank you very much! I really appreciate the feedback. That's a great idea, I plan to set up a Discord server in the near future!

reviews.review_description: I have been waiting for this... I love Gunfight from CoD. Can we get a remake of the Pine map?
Pls add gorier gore like blood splatters and stuff
I like this game because everyone has the same gun, (an optic would be amazing though) it’s simple and fun!
The game looks like it was made on a $2 budget and is buns
Cant reload

developer_response.body: I'm not sure why this would happen. Maybe you were on a server with really high ping? Sorry for the late reply!

reviews.review_title: Rly good game but has some bugs
reviews.review_description: Rly nice shooting game, there are some bugs where it will kick me out the whole game and sometimes the server also takes awhile to find someone to play against.
Loved it fun and cool

developer_response.body: Thank you for the support! I'm currently working on adding dual wielding and two-handing which will allow for more guns.
